name: Isamu Paint Co., Ltd.
summary: Isamu Paint Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells paints, solvents, and building materials in Japan and internationally. The company provides automotive, aerosol, industrial, general purpose, and building paints. It also manufactures and sells painting machinery and equipment, and painting rooms, as well as attached raw materials; designs, constructs, and contracts waterproofing and painting works; and leases and manages real estate properties. The company was founded in 1927 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
